CASE SETTLED, SIGNED STIP FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFTS JUANITA JACKSON, FRED WILLIAMS & ALSO YVONNE JACKSON BUT FIRST FILING FEE TO BE PAID. OTHER TWO DEFTS, SUNGAYA FLEMING & BOBBY HARRIS TO BE DEFAULTED. TERMS READ ONTO THE RECORD. PLTF TO SUBMIT STIP & PREPARE JUDGMENT.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT SERVED MAR-16-1998, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT FLEMING, SUNGAYA HARRIS, BOBBY

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JACKSON, YVONNE FLEMING, SUNGAYA HARRIS, BOBBY WILLIAMS, FRED JACKSON, JUANITA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1498 KIRKWOOD COURT, S.F., STAYED UNTIL MAY-12-1998, LEASE FORFEITED, NO FURTHER STAYS AS TO DEFTS JUANITA & YVONNE JACKSON AND FRED WILLIAMS. IF DEFTS COMPLY PLTF WILL VACATE THE JUDGMENT AND DISMISS WITH PREJUDICE, PROVIDED PREMISES ARE LEFT IN GOOD CONDITION. EACH SIDE TO BEAR OWN COSTS AND ATTY FEES.
